data.title: Suspected Sonic Labs wallet deposited 11.78 million S into Binance 6 hours ago, worth about $5.55 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, 6 hours ago, a wallet that may belong to Sonic Labs deposited 11.78 million S to Binance, worth about 5.55 million US dollars.

data.title: U.S.-China Tariff Dispute Nearing Resolution, Says Trump
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump indicated on Thursday that the ongoing tariff dispute between the United States and China might soon come to an end. Speaking to reporters at the White House, Trump expressed his reluctance to continue increasing tariffs, suggesting that excessive tariffs could deter consumer spending. He stated, "I don't want tariffs to keep rising because at a certain point, people stop buying." Trump further mentioned that he might not pursue additional tariff hikes and could even consider lowering the current rates to encourage consumer activity. He emphasized the importance of maintaining consumer purchasing power, noting that beyond a certain threshold, people might cease buying altogether. Additionally, Trump hinted that an agreement regarding the future of TikTok might require more time to finalize.

data.title: Solana Stablecoin Market Cap Reaches Record High
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from DefiLlama indicates that the market capitalization of Solana's stablecoins has reached a new all-time high of $12.73 billion.

data.title: Bitget Onchain launches Italianrot, DiMA, CATTLE and other tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) launched Solana ecosystem's MEME tokens Italianrot, DiMA, CATTLE.
Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly use the spot account (USDT/USDC) in the Bitget App to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base are supported.

data.title: This Bitcoin Bear Confirmation Is Yet To Appear, Glassnode Reveals
data.description:
The on-chain analytics firm Glassnode has revealed in a report how this historical bear market confirmation is yet to appear for Bitcoin in the current cycle. Bitcoin Unrealized Loss Hasn’t Spiked For Long-Term Holders Yet In its latest weekly report, Glassnode has discussed about the trend in the Unrealized Loss for the two major Bitcoin cohorts. The “Unrealized Loss” is an on-chain indicator that measures the total amount of loss that the BTC addresses as a whole are carrying. The metric works by going through the transfer history of each coin in circulation to see what price it was last moved at
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-bear-confirmation-glassnode-reveals/

data.title: Arizona: digital asset reserve bill advances to the House
data.description:
Arizona is moving closer to establishing a state bitcoin reserve, with just one final vote remaining before it reaches the Governor's desk for signing.
source: https://atlas21.com/arizona-digital-asset-reserve-bill-advances-to-the-house/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=arizona-digital-asset-reserve-bill-advances-to-the-house

data.title: GCATS rose above 0.004USDT. Since its launch on LBank, the maximum increase has reached 344%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows: LBank online token GCATS rose above 0.004USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.004574USDT, and is now quoted at 0.00418USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 318%. Since the launch of LBank, the current maximum increase has reached 344%, and the current market value is approximately 4.18 million US dollars.

data.title: Binance Lists Balance (EPT) on Alpha and Launches EPTUSDT Perpetual Futures with 20x Leverage
data.description:
Binance is thrilled to announce the listing of Balance (EPT) on Binance Alpha and Binance Futures, reinforcing its commitment to supporting innovative AI + Web3 protocols. Trading for EPT on Binance Alpha will commence on April 21, 2025, at 12:00 UTC, followed by the launch of the EPTUSDT perpetual contract on Binance Futures at 13:00 UTC the same day, offering up to 20x leverage. Airdrop Alert: 3,500 EPT GiveawayTo celebrate this milestone, Binance will airdrop 3,500 EPT tokens to eligible users directly into their Alpha accounts before April 21, 2025, 12:10 UTC. Eligibility Criteria:Must have purchased tokens on Binance Alpha using Spot or Funding accounts betweenApril 11, 00:00 UTC and April 17, 23:59 UTC
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/23075402576609?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: A whale that has been dormant for a year transferred 1,000 ETH to Binance 13 hours ago, worth about $1.6 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 1,000 ETH worth about $1.6 million to Binance 13 hours ago. The account had been dormant for a year, and these ETH can be traced back to 5 to 7 years ago when they were withdrawn from multiple centralized exchanges. Currently, the wallet holds a total of 2,001 ETH, with a total value of about $3.16 million.
